code: import api from"./api";export const createOrder=items=>{return api.post("/users/orders/create",{items});};export const getMyOrders=()=>{return api.get("/users/orders");};export const getOrderDetail=orderId=>{return api.get(`/users/orders/${orderId}`);};export const cancelOrder=orderId=>{return api.post(`/users/orders/${orderId}/cancel`);};
